carrierDirections.comment: Tek numaralar Saat Yönü (1 / CW), çift numaralar Saat Yönünün Tersidir (-1 / CCW).

assumptions: Odd/even carrier grouping is a candidate rule, not shop measured.
Direction reversal mirrors the visible spiral direction.
limitations: Not production accurate until observed on the physical machine.
Track plate, horn gear layout or manufacturer differences may change the real walkMap.
